mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_problem_interaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_problem_interaction (user_id, problem_id, hint_count, diagnose_count, explain_count, recommend_count, reflect_count, has_viewed_answer, consecutive_failures, last_submit_id, last_action_time, last_action_type, last_goal, last_guidance_type, error_tag, weak_points, learning_stage, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{hintCount}, #{diagnoseCount}, #{explainCount}, #{recommendCount}, #{reflectCount}, #{hasViewedAnswer}, #{consecutiveFailures}, #{lastSubmitId}, #{lastActionTime}, #{lastActionType}, #{lastGoal}, #{lastGuidanceType}, #{errorTag}, #{weakPoints}, #{learningStage}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET hint_count = #{hintCount}, diagnose_count = #{diagnoseCount}, explain_count = #{explainCount}, recommend_count = #{recommendCount}, reflect_count = #{reflectCount}, has_viewed_answer = #{hasViewedAnswer}, consecutive_failures = #{consecutiveFailures}, last_submit_id = #{lastSubmitId}, last_action_time = #{lastActionTime}, last_action_type = #{lastActionType}, last_goal = #{lastGoal}, last_guidance_type = #{lastGuidanceType}, error_tag = #{errorTag}, weak_points = #{weakPoints}, learning_stage = #{learningStage}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET hint_count = hint_count + 1, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET diagnose_count = diagnose_count + 1, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET explain_count = explain_count + 1, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET recommend_count = recommend_count + 1, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET reflect_count = reflect_count + 1, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET consecutive_failures = #{failures}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}

UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET error_tag = #{errorTag}, weak_points = #{weakPoints}, learning_stage = #{learningStage}, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}

UPDATE user_problem_interaction SET last_action_type = #{lastActionType}, last_goal = #{lastGoal}, last_guidance_type = #{lastGuidanceType}, learning_stage = #{learningStage}, last_action_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
